body: Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member(s) best able to assist.

## рџЋЇ Agentic Issue Triage

**Summary:** Bot-filed documentation gap issue requesting updates to the Azure Data Plane Generator README to document the auto-scaffolding behavior (README.md, CHANGELOG.md, Directory.Build.props) introduced in PR #57653.

<details>
<summary>рџ“‹ Issue Details</summary>

**Package:** `@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp` (Azure Data Plane Generator, `eng/packages/http-client-csharp/`)
**Affected API:** `NewAzureProjectScaffolding.WriteAdditionalFiles`; virtual methods `GetReadmeContent`, `GetChangelogContent`, `GetDirectoryBuildPropsContent`
**Scenarios:**
- Generator README has no mention of auto-scaffolded files or when they are produced
- No explanation that scaffolding is one-shot (files not overwritten on subsequent regenerations)
- No guidance on extending scaffolded content via virtual methods in custom generators

**Root ask:** Add documentation to `eng/packages/http-client-csharp/README.md` covering the scaffolded-files feature and how to extend it.
</details>

<details>
<summary>рџ”Ћ Debugging / Reproduction Notes</summary>

This is a pure documentation change triggered by PR #57653 (commit `fe4c0e1e`) by `@ArcturusZhang`. No code bugs are involved.

**Suggested investigation steps:**
1. Review PR #57653 to understand the `WriteAdditionalFiles` implementation and the three scaffolded files
2. Add a `### Scaffolded files` sub-section under `## Emitter options` in `eng/packages/http-client-csharp/README.md` describing the one-shot scaffolding behavior
3. Document the virtual methods (`GetReadmeContent`, `GetChangelogContent`, `GetDirectoryBuildPropsContent`) for custom generator authors
</details>

<details>
<summary>рџЏ·пёЏ Label Confidence</summary>

- **Category:** `Client` вЂ” The issue is about the Azure Data Plane Generator (`http-client-csharp`), which produces data-plane client libraries; not a management-plane or provisioning concern
- **Service:** `CodeGen` вЂ” Per triage guidelines, code generation issues for emitters/generators in `/eng/packages/` are classified as CodeGen; the label description ("Issues that relate to code generation") matches directly
- **Confidence:** High вЂ” Issue explicitly names the generator package and service directory; no ambiguity between services or categories; pattern confirmed by reference issue #23940 (`Client` + `CodeGen`)
</details>

<details>
<summary>рџ‘Ґ Owner Routing</summary>

- **Matched CODEOWNERS entry:** `# ServiceLabel: %CodeGen` (line ~1218) вЂ” only "CodeGen" required; issue has "CodeGen" вњ…
- **AzureSdkOwners:** `@JoshLove-msft`
- **ServiceOwners:** none listed
- **Routing action:** Assigned `@JoshLove-msft`
- **Scan notes:** Scanned bottom-to-top; first encountered `# ServiceLabel: %CodeGen %Mgmt` вЂ” requires "Mgmt" which the issue does not have в†’ skipped; next encountered `# ServiceLabel: %CodeGen` в†’ matched and stopped
</details>
